ecrans_soiree.title: Screen-free evening
ecrans_soiree.description: No screens after 7pm for the duration of the challenge

cuisine_famille.title: Family cooking
cuisine_famille.description: Cook a family meal together every day

cuisine_nouveau.title: New recipe
cuisine_nouveau.description: Try a brand new recipe each day

lecture_30min.title: 30 min of reading/day
lecture_30min.description: Read for at least 30 minutes every day

lecture_histoire.title: Bedtime story
lecture_histoire.description: Read a bedtime story to the kids every night

sport_marche.title: Daily walk
sport_marche.description: Take at least a 30 min family walk

menage_ranger.title: Tidy room
menage_ranger.description: Tidy up your room every morning before leaving

nature_sortie.title: Nature outing
nature_sortie.description: Spend time outdoors every day (park, garden, forest)

famille_jeu.title: Board game night
famille_jeu.description: Play a board game together every evening

famille_compliment.title: Compliment of the day
famille_compliment.description: Each family member gives a compliment to another

coop_explorateur_culinaire.title: Culinary explorers
coop_explorateur_culinaire.description: Cook 5 new recipes as a family this week. Everyone can suggest and help!

coop_zero_gaspi.title: Zero waste
coop_zero_gaspi.description: Finish all leftovers in the fridge before buying new food. Goal: 0 food items wasted this week.

coop_km_famille.title: Family marathon
coop_km_famille.description: Accumulate 42 km of walking/running as a family. Every outing counts!

coop_livres.title: Family library
coop_livres.description: Read 10 books or stories out loud together. Each book counts for everyone.

coop_sorties_nature.title: Outdoor adventurers
coop_sorties_nature.description: Go on 8 nature outings as a family this month (park, forest, beach, garden…).

coop_gentillesse.title: Kindness chain
coop_gentillesse.description: Do 20 acts of kindness as a family this week. Coffee in bed, a drawing, helping tidy up…

coop_ecrans_famille.title: Reconnected evenings
coop_ecrans_famille.description: Spend 5 screen-free evenings as a family this week. Games, conversations, crafts.

coop_menage_express.title: Cleaning blitz
coop_menage_express.description: Complete 10 express cleaning sessions (15 min timer, everyone pitches in).

coop_photo_jour.title: Family photo journal
coop_photo_jour.description: Take a family photo every day for 2 weeks. Anyone can be the photographer.

coop_gratitude_100.title: 100 thank-yous
coop_gratitude_100.description: Write 100 gratitudes as a family in one month. Each member contributes to the shared counter.

missions.tendresse_2: Say "I love you" to every family member
missions.tendresse_3: Draw a heart and hide it somewhere
missions.tendresse_4: Give a genuine compliment to everyone
missions.tendresse_5: Write a little letter or draw something for a parent
missions.tendresse_6: Prepare a surprise kiss when someone wakes up
missions.responsabilite_2: Set the table without being asked
missions.responsabilite_5: Sort your toys and donate the ones you no longer use
missions.responsabilite_6: Empty the dishwasher without being asked
missions.creativite_1: Make up a story and tell it to the family
missions.creativite_2: Make a drawing to decorate the house
missions.creativite_3: Put on a little show (song, dance, magic trick)
missions.creativite_4: Write or make up a song
missions.creativite_5: Build something with whatever you find at home
missions.entraide_1: Help a brother or sister with a chore
missions.entraide_2: Offer your help without being asked
missions.entraide_3: Share a favorite toy or book
missions.entraide_4: Comfort someone who is feeling sad

commun.3: A cookie or snack of your choice
commun.6: Choose your spot on the couch

mythique.2: King/Queen of the week — you pick the menu!

rare.1: Write family New Year's resolutions together

épique.1: Special late bedtime on New Year's Eve

commun.1: Write a kind note to a family member

rare.2: Everyone names 3 qualities of another member

rare.1: One free family prank (no payback allowed)
Easter egg hunt organized by the parents

épique.1: Activity of your choice (treetop course, kayak...)

commun.2: Pick your snacks for the week
Ghost scream at the next meal

légendaire.1: Haunted house or escape room outing
Family trip to the Christmas market
